topic: AI Coding Statistics 2026: 51% of GitHub Code Is Now AI-Assisted

competitors.title: AI Coding Tools 2026: Transforming Software Development
key_points: 84% of developers now use or plan to adopt AI coding tools
Over 51% of GitHub code committed in early 2026 was AI-assisted
AI coding tools market estimated at $12.8 billion in 2026
GitHub Copilot X leads with 37% market share
Shift from code completion to code creation represents paradigm shift

competitors.title: AI Coding Statistics 2026 — Adoption, Productivity & Market Metrics
key_points: 51% of professional developers use AI tools daily
Average 3.6 hours/week saved per developer using AI tools
AI-coauthored PRs show 1.7× more issues than human-only PRs
Gartner estimated 2025 AI code-assistant market at $3.0–$3.5B

competitors.title: AI-Generated Code Statistics 2026: Can AI Replace Your Development Team?
key_points: Nearly half of all code is now AI-generated
Focus on risks and why development teams still matter

stats.fact: 84% of developers use or plan to use AI coding tools (up from 76% in 2024)
51% of code committed to GitHub in early 2026 was AI-assisted
AI coding tools market size: $12.8 billion in 2026 (from $5.1B in 2024)
51% of professional developers use AI tools daily
3.6 hours average time saved per developer per week using AI tools
GitHub Copilot X holds 37% market share in 2026
AI-coauthored PRs have 1.7× more issues than human-only PRs
GitHub Copilot reached 20M+ all-time users as of mid-2025
Gartner estimated 2025 AI code-assistant market at $3.0–$3.5 billion
